# Issue templates

[简体中文](README_zh.md)

These YAML forms route reports into reproducible engineering or scientific
work. They collect evidence; they do not automatically change runtime state.

## Files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `bug_report.yml` | Captures reproducible product defects, environment details, expected behavior, and logs. |
| `config.yml` | Controls the GitHub issue chooser and external contact links. |
| `engineering_task.yml` | Describes bounded implementation, refactor, maintenance, or infrastructure work. |
| `feature_request.yml` | Records user problem, desired outcome, alternatives, and scope for a proposed capability. |
| `science_engineering.yml` | Captures scientific workflow/model requests with data, validation, reproducibility, and safety context. |

When changing a form, preserve public-data warnings: issue bodies can be
world-readable and must not solicit credentials or private research material.
